testcase.name: Status code is 200

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 403

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ccb4dbde-3229-4f88-81e5-b47c4254b8a0. Collection name: Automation Engineer Test. Request name: Shift Management / Get All Shifts. Test description: Status code is 200. Error message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 403. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 200 but got 403 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:4).

testcase.name: Shifts array exists

failure.message: expected undefined to be an array

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ccb4dbde-3229-4f88-81e5-b47c4254b8a0. Collection name: Automation Engineer Test. Request name: Shift Management / Get All Shifts. Test description: Shifts array exists. Error message: expected undefined to be an array. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to be an array at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:4).

testcase.name: At least one shift exists
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ccb4dbde-3229-4f88-81e5-b47c4254b8a0. Collection name: Automation Engineer Test. Request name: Shift Management / Get All Shifts. Test description: At least one shift exists. Error message: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length'). Stacktrace: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length') at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:4).

testcase.name: Pagination exists
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ccb4dbde-3229-4f88-81e5-b47c4254b8a0. Collection name: Automation Engineer Test. Request name: Shift Management / Get All Shifts. Test description: Pagination exists. Error message: expected undefined to exist. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to exist at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:4:4).

testcase.name: Current page is returned
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ccb4dbde-3229-4f88-81e5-b47c4254b8a0. Collection name: Automation Engineer Test. Request name: Shift Management / Get All Shifts. Test description: Current page is returned. Error message: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'currentPage'). Stacktrace: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'currentPage') at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:5:4).

testcase.name: Status code is 200

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 403

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ccb4dbde-3229-4f88-81e5-b47c4254b8a0. Collection name: Automation Engineer Test. Request name: Shift Management / Get My Shifts. Test description: Status code is 200. Error message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 403. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 200 but got 403 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:5).

testsuite.name: New Request
